---
title: Practice Problem Generator
subtitle: Statistics in Psychology
author: Guenther, Benjamin A.
project:
  type: website
  output-dir: docs
  render:
    - Sample_Document.qmd
    - 08 - Hypothesis_Test_z-Scores.qmd
    - 09 - Single-Sample_t_Tests.qmd
    - 10 - Independent-Samples_t-Tests.qmd
    - 11 - Dependent-Samples_t-Tests.qmd
    - 12 - one-way_ANOVA.qmd
    - 13 - repeated-measures_ANOVA.qmd
    - 14 - factorial_ANOVA.qmd
format: 
  html: default
listing:
  type: table
---
